metadata.description: iii editorial-register skills: architecture diagrams, system-reference infographics, scroll-snap slide decks, and throwaway interactive HTML editors with copy-as-prompt export

plugins.name: iii-architecture-diagram
plugins.description: Standalone iii architecture diagrams (SVG + optional PNG). One focal element, max 9 nodes, ember accent on the iii primary path. Cream paper or warm dark.

plugins.name: iii-infographic
plugins.description: Single-page iii system reference infographics. Six to eight numbered sections, real numbers from code, cream + dark themes. Also handles diff reviews, plan reviews, and project recaps.

plugins.name: iii-slides
plugins.description: Single-file scroll-snap slide deck for iii talks and demos. 100dvh per slide, cream + dark themes, no auto-advance, ember accent anchored to a binary axis.

plugins.name: iii-playground
plugins.description: Throwaway single-file HTML editors with copy-as-prompt export. Five patterns: kanban (drag triage), tuner (sliders + live preview), form-editor (config with constraints), split-preview (text + live render), curate (approve/reject/tag). Same iii editorial register as the rest of the bundle.
